svg.title: Sentinel-2 band composites and NDVI
svg.desc: Diagram showing how Sentinel-2 bands B2, B3, B4, and B8 combine into true colour, false colour, and NDVI outputs.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What wavelength does Sentinel-2 band B2 capture?')
sendPrompt('What wavelength does Sentinel-2 band B3 capture?')
sendPrompt('What wavelength does Sentinel-2 band B4 capture?')
sendPrompt('What wavelength does Sentinel-2 band B8 capture?')
sendPrompt('When should I use a true colour composite?')
g.text: R ← B4 · G ← B3 · B ← B2

g.onclick: sendPrompt('When is false colour CIR composite useful in remote sensing?')
g.text: R ← B8 · G ← B4 · B ← B3

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How do I compute and visualise NDVI from Sentinel-2 with rasterio?')
